tasks.subject: Task 1: Foundation - Token System
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Define color token system in new tokens.css, import globally, migrate global.css to use tokens.

**Files:**
- Create: `frontend/src/styles/css/tokens.css`
- Modify: `frontend/src/styles/css/index.css` (global styles entry)
- Modify: `frontend/src/styles/css/global.css`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- tokens.css has all light + dark --color-* tokens per spec
- tokens.css imported by global styles entry
- global.css uses var(--color-*) instead of hardcoded Journal Ink hex
- pnpm typecheck exits 0
- dev server renders /user correctly in light + dark mode

**Verify:** `cd /home/charles/PaiSmart/frontend && pnpm typecheck` → exit 0.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/styles/css/tokens.css", "frontend/src/styles/css/index.css", "frontend/src/styles/css/global.css"], "verifyCommand": "cd /home/charles/PaiSmart/frontend && pnpm typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["tokens.css created with all --color-* tokens (light + dark)", "tokens.css imported by global entry", "global.css references var(--color-*) instead of Journal Ink hex", "pnpm typecheck exit 0", "dev server renders /user in both modes"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Layouts + Global Components
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Migrate all layout + global/common/advanced/custom components to color tokens + Material Symbols.

**Files:**
- Modify: frontend/src/layouts/** (all subdirs)
- Modify: frontend/src/components/common/**, advanced/**, custom/**

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- All Journal Ink hex values replaced with var(--color-*)
- All non-Material-Symbols icons replaced per spec mapping
- pnpm typecheck exits 0
- /knowledge-base, /chat, /user, /login render in both modes

**Verify:** pnpm typecheck exit 0.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/layouts/**", "frontend/src/components/**"], "verifyCommand": "cd /home/charles/PaiSmart/frontend && pnpm typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all Journal Ink hex replaced with tokens", "all icon-mdi/ph/heroicons/ant-design replaced with material-symbols", "pnpm typecheck exit 0", "browser smoke test in light + dark mode"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Final Sweep + Verification
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Final sweep for remaining hardcoded colors and mixed icon families. Run final verification across all key pages in light + dark mode. Get user sign-off.

**Files:** (depends on grep findings)

**User Verification Required:**
Before marking this task complete, you MUST call AskUserQuestion:
```yaml
AskUserQuestion:
  question: "整个项目的配色和 icon 统一重构完成。在亮色/暗色模式下浏览各页(knowledge-base / chat / model-provider / invite-code / user / login 等)后,整体效果如何?"
  header: "Verification"
  options:
    - label: "整体好看,可以收尾"
      description: "学术蓝 + 焦橙 + Material Symbols 符合预期,亮/暗模式都 OK"
    - label: "需要调整"
      description: "某些页面/某些颜色/某些 icon 还需要调,告诉我哪里"
```

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- grep finds no remaining non-Material-Symbols icon calls in .vue/.ts/.tsx
- grep finds no remaining Journal Ink hex (with documented exceptions)
- pnpm typecheck exit 0
- pnpm build succeeds
- pnpm lint no new errors
- All key pages render in light + dark mode
- User confirms overall look

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "cd /home/charles/PaiSmart/frontend && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no remaining non-Material-Symbols icon calls", "no remaining Journal Ink hex", "pnpm typecheck + build + lint pass", "browser walkthrough in light + dark", "user sign-off on overall look"], "requiresUserVerification": true, "userVerificationPrompt": "整个项目的配色和 icon 统一重构完成。在亮色/暗色模式下浏览各页(knowledge-base / chat / model-provider / invite-code / user / login 等)后,整体效果如何?"}
```
